hero.title: I turn research into products people actually use.
hero.subtitle: Bryan Jeshua — Principal of Klaussa, an AI legal-tech startup backed by Google, NVIDIA, and UI Incubate. Previously Product at tiket.com. CS undergrad at Universitas Indonesia.

about.title: The Short Version
about.content:
I started Klaussa because **20–30% of legal work is repetitive** — and lawyers shouldn't spend their careers on it. We built an AI co-pilot that turns weeks of contract analysis into 15 minutes. Today, we're backed by **Google for AI Startups**, the **NVIDIA Inception** program, and **UI Incubate**.

Before Klaussa, I worked on **pricing strategy at tiket.com**, where I learned how small product decisions compound across millions of users. I study **Computer Science at Universitas Indonesia**, and I write here about building products, leading teams, and figuring things out in public.
